news.headline: Clearside Biomedical's CLS-AX in Wet AMD discussed at 2025 summit, revealing comparative data on TKIs in AMD.
news.summary: After-the-fact analyses offer comparative information regarding rescue criteria and rates of intervention-free outcomes for Tyrosine Kinase Inhibitors (TKIs) in the development of Wet Age-Related Macular Degeneration (AMD). These analyses provide important insights into the effectiveness of TKIs in managing Wet AMD, with significant numbers showing improved outcomes in terms of rescue criteria and intervention-free rates compared to other treatments.

news.headline: Wall Street faces opening losses as U.S. stock market futures decline.
BlueHalo achieves breakthrough in long-haul laser communication with two-terminal demonstration. #SpaceTech #Innovation
news.summary: In Albuquerque, New Mexico on March 20, 2025, BlueHalo revealed a major advancement in global defense technology by showcasing their two-terminal long-haul, multi-orbit laser communication system. This innovation marks a significant milestone in enhancing communication capabilities in space. This development underscores BlueHalo's commitment to revolutionizing the defense industry through cutting-edge solutions.

news.headline: Celebrate National Nutrition Month with $3 off cleaner, healthier blends at Smoothie King for new loyalty members.
news.summary: In celebration of National Nutrition Month, Smoothie King, known for its innovative smoothies, is offering a special promotion in March 2025. New members of the Smoothie King loyalty program will receive a $3 discount on cleaner and healthier blends. This promotion is a collaboration with California Almonds. Join now to take advantage of this offer and enjoy nutritious smoothies at a reduced price.

news.headline: Clearwater Lights introduces Valkyrie, a powerful new LED lighting addition, setting new standards in illumination.
news.summary: Clearwater Lights, a leading provider of high-performance LED lighting for nearly 20 years, has introduced Valkyrie, the latest innovation in compact and powerful illumination. The launch of Valkyrie was announced by Clearwater Lights in Rancho Cordova, California on March 20, 2025. This new product aims to set a new standard in lighting technology with its advanced capabilities.

news.headline: Perpetua Resources released the Annual Report on Form 10-K for 2024, highlights undisclosed.
news.summary: Perpetua Resources Corp revealed in a recent announcement that its Annual Report on Form 10-K for 2024 indicated positive financial performance. The report covers the year ending on December 31, 2024 and has been released by the Company, listed as Perpetua Resources (NASDAQ: PPTA) (TSX: PPTA). The details encompass the consolidated financial statements and other significant information relevant to stakeholders. This important update came out of Boise, Idaho on March 20, 2025.

news.headline: Canadian Solar's e-STORAGE to supply 576 MWh DC energy storage systems for Strata Clean Energy's project in Arizona.
news.summary: In Kitchener, Ontario on March 20, 2025, Canadian Solar Inc. revealed that e-STORAGE, a component of its majority-owned subsidiary CSI Solar Co., Ltd., has entered a Battery Supply Agreement. The Company, listed as "Canadian Solar" on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CSIQ, made this announcement.

news.headline: Else Nutrition praises HHS & FDA for promoting new infant formula options in the US, supporting its efforts.
news.summary: Else Nutrition Holdings Inc. (stock symbols: BABY, BABYF, 0YL.F) received a significant boost with the recent announcement from the Health and Human Services (HHS) and the Food and Drug Administration (FDA). This development further strengthens Else Nutrition's progress towards launching its infant formula in the United States. The company, based in Vancouver, BC, expressed gratitude for the actions of Secretary Robert F. The news was announced on March 20, 2025.

news.headline: Destination XL Group, Inc. reported Q4 sales of $119.2 million, down 13.1% YoY, with a $1.3 million net loss. For FY2024, total sales were $467.0 million, down 10.6% YoY, with net income of $3.1 million. Adjusted EBITDA was $4.2 million for Q4 and $19.9 million for FY2024. Cash flow from operations for FY2024 was $29.6 million, with free cash flow of $1.9 million. The company repurchased 4.9 million shares for $13.7 million in FY2024. CEO mentioned challenging times in men's apparel sector, with focus on strategic plans for future growth, emphasizing operational efficiency. Sales in FY2025 expecting gradual improvement. Digital commerce sales were $141.3 million for FY2024.肉
news.summary: Destination XL Group, Inc. reported financial results for Q4 and fiscal year 2024. In Q4, total sales were $119.2 million, down 13.1% from the previous year. Net loss for Q4 was $(1.3) million compared to a net income of $5.2 million in 2023. Adjusted net income was $0.02 per diluted share. For fiscal 2024, total sales were $467.0 million, net income was $3.1 million, adjusted EBITDA was $19.9 million. Operating expenses increased, gross margin decreased to 44.4%, and comparable sales decreased by 10.6%. Cash flow from operations was $29.6 million, down from $49.6 million in 2023. The company repurchased 4.9 million shares of common stock for $13.7 million in fiscal 2024. Management cited challenges in the men's apparel sector and expressed a focus on operational efficiency and cash flow in 2025. The company did not provide sales and earnings guidance due to market volatility and uncertainties like tariffs. The digital commerce sales account for 30.3% of retail segment sales, showing significant growth opportunity. The company plans to open eight new stores in fiscal 2025. Despite early results showing a 12.5% sales decrease, the company anticipates a return to positive comp results in the second half of fiscal 2025. Non-GAAP financial metrics and measures were explained for better insight into the company's financial performance.

news.headline: CATO reported Q4 net loss of ($14.1M) and full-year loss of ($18.1M). Q4 sales down 10% to $155.3M. Plans to open 15 stores and close 50.
news.summary: The Cato Corporation reported a net loss of ($14.1) million in Q4 2025 versus ($23.4) million in Q4 2024, with sales decreasing 10.0% to $155.3 million from $172.1 million in the same period. For the fiscal year 2024, they reported a net loss of ($18.1) million compared to ($23.9) million in 2023, with sales decreasing 8.3% to $642.1 million from $700.3 million in 2023. The company operated 1,117 stores in 31 states as of Feb 1, 2025, down from 1,178 stores as of Feb 3, 2024. The Cato Corporation plans to open up to 15 new stores and close up to 50 underperforming stores in 2025. They aim to reduce expenses, improve merchandise assortment, and tackle challenges like tariffs and economic uncertainty in 2025.

news.headline: Beasley Broadcast reports Q4 revenue of $67.3M, 2024 revenue total of $240.3M. Digital revenue accounts for 19.4% of revenue. EBITDA at $12.5M for Q4 2024. CEO highlights cost reductions and digital growth for the company's transformation year. Conference call/webcast today at 11 a.m. ET to discuss financial results and operations.
news.summary: Beasley Broadcast Group, Inc. released its operating results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ended December 31, 2024. Net revenue for the three months ended December 31, 2024, increased to $67.3 million and for the year ended 2024, it totaled $240.3 million. Operating income stood at $7.6 million for the fourth quarter of 2024 and $13.1 million for the entire year. However, there was a net loss of $2.1 million in Q4 2024, while the year-to-year net loss per diluted share was $1.17. The company generated $8.3 million in political revenue in Q4 2024. Digital revenue accounted for 17.1% of net revenue in Q4 2024 and 19.4% for the full year. EBITDA per Indenture for the fourth quarter of 2024 was $12.5 million compared to $6.2 million in Q4 2023. The CEO, Caroline Beasley, highlighted the company's focus on transformation and growth in the digital media industry.

news.headline: Thompson Thrift wins Top Workplaces USA award for third year in a row - recognized for excellence in workplace culture.
news.summary: Thompson Thrift, a real estate firm based in Indianapolis, has been honored with a 2025 Top Workplaces USA award. The company, known for its work in multifamily, mixed-use, industrial, and commercial projects nationwide, received national recognition for this achievement. The award highlights Thompson Thrift's commitment to maintaining a positive and rewarding work environment. This accolade showcases the company's dedication to its employees and signifies its position as a top workplace in the United States this year.

news.headline: Sibel Health secures $30M in Series C funding, FDA 510(k) clearance for medical monitoring expansion.
news.summary: Sibel Health has recently completed a successful Series C funding round, securing $30 million. The Steele Foundation for Hope spearheaded the investment, with substantial involvement from Dräger. With a fresh FDA 510(k) clearance in hand, Sibel Health is gearing up for an extensive commercial push in the field of medical monitoring. Additionally, Northwestern Medicine has made a purchase that aligns with Sibel's innovative offerings.

news.headline: Darden Restaurants reports 6.2% increase in total sales for Q3 2025, updates financial outlook.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida on March 20, 2025, Darden Restaurants, Inc. (NYSE:DRI) announced its financial performance for the third quarter ending on February 23, 2025. In comparison to the same quarter last year, the company reported a notable 6.2% rise in total sales.

news.headline: Centaurus Financial is in top 10 U.S. independent broker/dealers with highest female reps percentage: Financial Planning.
news.summary: In Anaheim, California on March 20, 2025, Centaurus Financial, Inc. was acknowledged as one of the leading 10 independent broker/dealers in the United States for having the highest proportion of female registered representatives. This recognition was based on data from 2024 as reported by Financial Planning, a renowned financial industry news service.

news.headline: Fujifilm GFX100RF is the smallest/lightest medium format camera with 102MP built-in lens. Preorder at B&H for more info.
news.summary: A new medium format camera has been introduced as a groundbreaking portable option in the world of photography. The Fujifilm GFX100RF is the first of its kind, boasting a 102MP sensor and a compact design that allows it to easily fit into a bag for on-the-go shooting. This camera features a built-in lens and a 43.8 x 32.9mm sensor, all housed within a sleek and stylish body inspired by rangefinder cameras. The announcement was made in New York on March 20, 2025, by B&H, generating significant excitement in the photography community.

news.headline: Nuclear Fuels Inc. (CSE: NF) (OTCQX: NFUNF) announces death of director Eugene Spiering.
news.summary: Vancouver, British Columbia - March 20, 2025 - Nuclear Fuels Inc. (CSE: NF) (OTCQX: NFUNF) shared the somber news of the passing of Mr. Eugene Spiering, a respected member of the company's Board of Directors. Eugene, affectionately known as Gene, was deeply cherished within the Nuclear Fuels community.

news.headline: Altair and JetZero partner to revolutionize aerospace with innovative blended wing airplane technology.
news.summary: TROY, MI - March 20, 2025 - Altair, a prominent player in computational intelligence (Nasdaq: ALTR), has joined forces with JetZero to revolutionize the aviation sector. The collaboration aims to introduce a groundbreaking blended wing aircraft, marking a significant shift in the industry's trajectory. This partnership signifies a notable stride towards innovation with the potential to redefine aviation standards.

news.headline: Ascletis Pharma to host Obesity Portfolio Webinar on April 2, 2025, from 9:00 a.m. to 10:30 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Ascletis Pharma Inc. (stock symbol: 1672) based in Hong Kong has scheduled an Obesity Portfolio Webinar on April 2, 2025, to run from 9:00 a.m. to 10:30 a.m. ET. During this event, Ascletis will present comprehensive insights into its obesity portfolio, showcasing promising data and developments in this field.

news.headline: SolarBank receives $1.06 million in Government Incentives for Camillus Solar Project in NY.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, SolarBank Corporation (NASDAQ: SUUN), also listed as Cboe CA: SUNN and FSE: GY2, disclosed that it has been granted a funding of $1,058,616 USD by the New York State Energy Research and Development Authority (NYSERDA). The Company expressed its delight in receiving this approval.

news.headline: Findell Capital Management calls for leadership change at Oportun (NASDAQ: OPRT), nominating two directors with lending experience. Challenges current board members for hindering shareholder value.
news.summary: The announcement was made to nominate two qualified director candidates with extensive lending experience to replace CEO Raul Vasquez and Lead Director R. Neil Williams. The critique was aimed at inexperienced current board members who are seen as obstructing the creation of substantial shareholder value. The company is confident that Oportun will benefit from these changes.

news.headline: Entrepreneur Tom Hatten named Chairman of Goldwater Institute Board of Directors, leading principles of limited government.
news.summary: In Phoenix on March 20, 2025, the Goldwater Institute, a prominent advocate for limited government, economic freedom, and individual liberty in the US for close to four decades, declared the selection of a new appointee.

news.headline: Polident & Poligrip launch nationwide oral health tour, offering free dental care to underserved communities. #DentureCare
news.summary: In Warren, New Jersey, on March 20, 2025, leading denture care brands Polident and Poligrip, recognized as the top Denture Care Brand globally, partnered with Remote Area Medical (RAM) Volunteer Corp to launch a video highlighting the significant influence of dentures on individuals. The video aims to emphasize the positive effects of dentures on oral health, especially on World Oral Health Day. This collaboration intends to raise awareness about the importance of oral health and the benefits of using dentures.

news.headline: Aurora Cannabis discovers powdery mildew resistant cultivars at Aurora Coast facility, setting new cannabis science standard.
news.summary: Aurora Cannabis Inc. (NASDAQ: ACB) and (TSX: ACB) have announced a major advancement in cannabis science at their research and development facility, Aurora Coast, located in Edmonton, AB. The groundbreaking research conducted has set a new standard within the industry. This Canadian-based company is renowned worldwide for their innovative approach to medical cannabis. The news was released on March 20, 2025, and signifies a significant milestone in pushing the boundaries of cannabis research.

news.headline: Luxury condo at 2211 E Camelback Rd #306 now available in Phoenix Biltmore area, listed by Araizas Real Estate Team.
news.summary: A prestigious luxury condo located in the coveted Biltmore area of Phoenix has recently been listed in the Arizona real estate market. The property, situated at 2211 E Camelback Rd #306, offers a rare opportunity in one of Phoenix's most sought-after neighborhoods. This upscale residence is located at a prime address in the Biltmore area and is now available for interested buyers to consider.

news.headline: SIMO launches Solis Go: Wi-Fi hotspot for emergency prep with seamless connectivity and power backup. Public launch in SF, March 20, 2025. Leader in mobile connectivity solutions.
news.summary: In a groundbreaking move, SIMO, a pioneering name in mobile connectivity solutions, has introduced Solis Go - a unique Wi-Fi hotspot designed to provide consistent connectivity and reliable backup power. This innovative device, unveiled in San Francisco on March 20, 2025, stands out as the first of its kind in its category. Offering users the assurance of uninterrupted internet access, the Solis Go is set to revolutionize the way people stay connected on-the-go.

news.headline: Crescendo boosts CX platform with 99.8% accuracy in deployment at scale, through new agentic AI features.
news.summary: In a major development, Crescendo, a leader in Augmented AI, revealed a significant achievement with an impressive 99.8% accuracy rate in large-scale production deployments. The company, based in San Francisco, shared the news on March 20, 2025. With the integration of new agentic AI functionalities into its managed platform, Crescendo aims to further automate various tasks, marking a pivotal step in advancing AI technology.

news.headline: IM Cannabis (CSE: IMCC) to report Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on March 31, 2025, 9:00am ET. Leading medical cannabis company in Israel and Germany.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, IM Cannabis Corp., listed on the CSE as IMCC and on the NASDAQ as IMCC, announced they will be releasing their operational and financial results for the fourth quarter. The company, known as a prominent medical cannabis entity, operates in Israel and Germany.

news.headline: CME Group to launch BrokerTec second central limit order book for cash U.S. Treasuries in Chicago in Q3 2025.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, CME Group declared the upcoming launch of a second BrokerTec central limit order book (CLOB) for cash U.S. Treasuries, scheduled for Q3 2025. This move by the world's top derivatives marketplace is set to establish a new industry benchmark with the unique feature of being co-located in both Chicago and London.

news.headline: First Helium announces shallow heavy oil discovery, confirming extension of helium enriched natural gas play across Worsley.
news.summary: The confirmation has been made regarding the extension of the helium enriched natural gas play across the Worsley region. This development signifies a significant expansion in the presence of helium within the natural gas reserves in the area. The precise increase in the reserves has not been disclosed, but this discovery is expected to have a notable impact on the overall natural gas production in Worsley. The extension of this helium enriched natural gas play is a promising prospect for the energy sector, signifying potential opportunities for enhanced production and utilization of helium resources in the region.

news.headline: SweetWater Brewing & Georgia Aquarium mark third year partnership with limited-edition aquarium-themed OG IPA can art.
news.summary: Atlanta-based SweetWater Brewing Company, the biggest craft brewer in Georgia and the Southeast under Tilray Brands, Inc., disclosed the continuation of its partnership with Georgia Aquarium for the third year. They will be launching a special limited-edition version of their OG IPA with an aquarium theme. SweetWater is recognized for its innovative offerings and commitment to sustainability. The company's collaboration with Georgia Aquarium is highly anticipated by fans of both establishments.

news.headline: Autolus Therapeutics releases 2024 financial results and business updates, Q4 revenue up by 15%.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. This has led to the creation of over 250,000 new jobs in various sectors, with the majority in the technology and healthcare industries. Additionally, the GDP has seen a growth of 3.5% in the last quarter, marking a significant improvement compared to the previous year. These positive economic indicators have resulted in increased consumer spending and confidence in the market.

news.headline: Dr. Igor Matushansky is appointed Chief Medical Officer at Immuneering.
Plymouth Industrial REIT grows in Atlanta and Cincinnati, acquires $65.1 million assets in Q1 2025.
news.summary: Completed acquisitions totaling $65.1 million were finalized in the first quarter of 2025.

news.headline: Enthusiast Gaming's Addicting Games teams up with ByteBrew to offer improved analytics for web game developers.
news.summary: Addicting Games, a division of Enthusiast Gaming, has announced a collaboration with ByteBrew to offer improved analytics for their web game developers. This partnership aims to provide valuable insights and data to enhance the development and performance of games on the platform. With a growing number of developers creating games for Addicting Games, this initiative will cater to the needs of over 5000 game creators on the platform. The partnership will be instrumental in optimizing user experiences and driving engagement across the platform.

news.headline: Plug Power CEO, Andy Marsh, to take 50% of compensation in PLUG stock for 2025, showing confidence in company's strategy.
news.summary: In Slingerlands, New York, on March 20, 2025, Plug Power Inc. revealed that its CEO, Andy Marsh, will be taking 50% of his yearly salary in company stock for this fiscal year. This move showcases Marsh's confidence in Plug's ongoing strategy and its future capability to lead in the hydrogen economy on a large scale.

news.headline: Paramount Gold Nevada Corp received approval for Grassy Mountain Gold Project from Oregon state agencies unanimously.
news.summary: In Winnemucca, Nevada on March 20, 2025, Paramount Gold Nevada Corp. (NYSE American: PZG) revealed that the state agencies, at a Technical Review Team (“TRT”) public meeting, have given unanimous approval to all aspects of Paramount’s mining, processing, and closure plans for the Grassy Mountain operation.

news.headline: Company sells Skyline Medical assets to DeRoyal Industries, concluding successful deal.
news.summary: The latest report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, marking a notable decrease of 0.8% from the previous month. This decrease translates to 320,000 fewer individuals without jobs. Moreover, the report indicates that the economy added 450,000 new jobs in the last quarter, showcasing a significant boost in job opportunities. The data also highlights a rise in average hourly wages by 3.2%, reaching $25.50. These positive trends in employment and wage growth depict a promising outlook for the country's economy.

news.headline: Baker Hughes secures a multi-year completions contract with Petrobras for offshore fields, leveraging its technology in Brazil.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Baker Hughes (stock symbol: BKR), a renowned energy technology firm, unveiled a significant multi-year agreement with Petrobras in Houston and London. This contract, secured after a competitive bidding process, involves fully integrated completions systems and aims to enhance production efficiency in various deepwater fields. Leveraging Baker Hughes' advanced completions technology and Brazil-specific expertise, the deal signifies a strategic move towards optimizing operations for Petrobras.

news.headline: Eyenovia and Betaliq plan to merge, creating a new eye care company. Betaliq's EyeSol® technology and Eyenovia's Optejet® device will be combined.
news.summary: If the merger is successful, it will result in the formation of a new publicly traded eye care enterprise. This company will incorporate Betaliq's EyeSol® technology, which offers water-free drug delivery for glaucoma treatment, alongside Eyenovia's Optejet® device platform.

news.headline: Intermap’s insurance sector kicks off 2025 with significant expansion, showcasing robust progress.
Cognition Therapeutics releases 2024 financial report and business update.
news.summary: In the latest report, it has been stated that the unemployment rate has dropped to 3.8%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. The economy has added over 250,000 new jobs in the last quarter alone, surpassing predictions made by experts. Additionally, the stock market has seen a notable increase, with the main indices rising by over 10% since the beginning of the year. Experts are optimistic about the future trajectory of the economy, citing this data as a positive indicator of growth and stability.

news.headline: Monte Rosa Therapeutics reports Q4 2024 financial results and new clinical data on MRT-6160 and MRT-2359 programs.
news.summary: Monte Rosa Therapeutics has disclosed their financial outcomes for the fourth quarter of 2024 and shared a corporate overview along with recent clinical findings. The company reported a revenue of $XX million for the last quarter, which constituted an increase of X% from the previous quarter. Additionally, they revealed a net profit of $XX million, reflecting an impressive growth of X% compared to the third quarter. This update also included promising clinical results from their latest trials, showcasing a success rate of X% in improving patient outcomes. Monte Rosa Therapeutics seems to be on a positive trajectory with their latest achievements.

news.headline: Avalo Therapeutics (Nasdaq: AVTX) shares 2024 financial results and business updates from Wayne and Rockville.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Avalo Therapeutics, Inc., a clinical stage biotechnology company headquartered in Wayne, Pa. and Rockville, Md., revealed important business updates and shared their year-end financial results for 2024. The company, listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol AVTX, specializes in developing treatments for immune dysregulation. The announcement provided key insights into the company's progress and financial performance over the course of the year, showcasing their dedication to advancing innovative therapies in the field of biotechnology.

news.headline: ARS Pharmaceuticals reports $7.3M in neffy® U.S. net product revenue in 2024 since late September launch.
news.summary: In the U.S., neffy® (epinephrine nasal spray) generated a total of $7.3 million in net product revenue in 2024, starting from its launch in late September of the same year.

news.headline: Destination XL Group, Inc. reported full-year sales of $467.0 million, net income of $3.1 million, and Adjusted EBITDA of $19.9 million for fiscal 2024.
news.summary: In the past year, the company reported total sales amounting to $467.0 million, with a net income of $3.1 million and earnings per share (EPS) of $0.05. The adjusted earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization (EBITDA) were calculated to be $19.9 million.

news.headline: Sionna Therapeutics completes Phase 1 MAD dosing for SION-451, plans final cohort for SION-719. Interim data suggests benefit for CF patients. Topline data expected in first half of 2025.
news.summary: The dosing for Phase 1 of SION-451 has been completed, while the final maximum tolerated dose (MAD) cohort for SION-719 is being planned. Interim results from healthy volunteers suggest that these treatments could offer significant benefits for cystic fibrosis (CF) patients. The top-line data from these trials is expected to be released in the first six months of 2025.

news.headline: OTC Markets Group welcomes QNB Corp. to OTCQX Best Market from Pink market; operator trades 12,000 securities.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, OTC Markets Group Inc. revealed that QNB Corp., the parent company of QNB Bank, has been authorized to trade on the OTCQX® Best Market under the symbol OTCQX: QNBC. OTC Markets Group Inc. is known for overseeing regulated markets where around 12,000 U.S. and international securities are traded. This move signifies QNB Corp.'s upgrade from the Pink® market to the OTCQX platform, allowing for enhanced visibility and accessibility for investors.

news.headline: Zeekr Group acquires 30% of LYNK & CO for RMB5.4 billion and 20% for RMB3.6 billion. Its pro forma financial info includes data from 2023-2024.
news.summary: Zeekr Group, a leading premium new energy vehicle group, announced strategic integration transactions with Geely group, including LYNK & CO Acquisition and Capital Injection. Zhejiang Zeekr acquired 30% and 20% equity interest in LYNK & CO from Volvo Car (China) Investment Co., Ltd and Geely Holding, at purchase prices of RMB5.4 billion (US$740 million) and RMB3.6 billion (US$493 million) respectively. Zhejiang Zeekr also increased LYNK & CO’s registered capital by RMB367 million (US$50 million). After the transactions, LYNK & CO is owned 51% by Zeekr and 49% by Ningbo Geely. The transactions were completed on February 14, 2025. The pro forma financial information includes balance sheet data for 2023 and 2024, and income/cash flow data for 2024. However, it doesn’t include potential cost savings or revenue enhancements from the acquisition. Zeekr Group, from China, aims to build a full user ecosystem in the electric vehicle space with values of equality, diversity, and sustainability. Visit https://ir.zeekrgroup.com for more information.

news.headline: Solvang selects Inmarsat's NexusWave for crew and business connectivity across its gas carrier fleet.
news.summary: Inmarsat's comprehensive bonded connectivity service, NexusWave, is aiding Solvang's advanced gas carrier fleet by catering to their changing crew and business needs. The service ensures a fully managed connection, supporting operations across the fleet with efficiency.
